creator: wangjiaz@gmail.com
text:
The onboard NIC (RealTek 8168/8111B PCIe Gigabit Ethernet) can be
recognized correctly, but it doesn't work.

How-To-Repeat: 1) install FreeBSD 6.2 on ASUS M2A-VM
2) configure re0, set it up
3) ping the gateway 192.168.1.1; loss rate is above 50%
